name: Silicon Valley / San Francisco Bay Area
climate: Mediterranean; dry warm summers, mild wet winters; fog common along coast; minimal temperature extremes

neighbors.name: USMCA
neighbors.relevance: Silicon Valley sits within USMCA territory; digital trade provisions and IP rules shaped by tech industry lobbying

neighbors.name: Indo-Pacific
neighbors.relevance: Pacific Rim is the primary market and supply chain partner; semiconductor fabs in Taiwan, assembly in China and Southeast Asia

neighbors.name: US Corn Belt
neighbors.relevance: Ag-tech innovation from Silicon Valley (precision farming, satellite monitoring) transforms Corn Belt productivity

neighbors.name: US Rust Belt
neighbors.relevance: EV and autonomous vehicle tech developed in Silicon Valley is manufactured in Rust Belt factories

neighbors.name: Greater Bay Area (Shenzhen)
neighbors.relevance: Primary global competitor in hardware, AI, and consumer electronics; talent and capital competition

links.description: Silicon Valley drives USMCA digital trade chapters; tech firms operate across all three member countries
TSMC and other Taiwan fabs produce the advanced chips Silicon Valley designs; strait tensions are existential risk
Shenzhen tech ecosystem competes in AI, 5G, and consumer hardware; US-China tech decoupling reshapes supply chains
EV batteries, autonomous driving systems, and industrial automation flow from Valley R&D to Midwest manufacturing
Five Eyes intelligence sharing shapes tech export controls, cybersecurity standards, and data governance
RCEP members are major markets for cloud services, semiconductors, and consumer tech; regulatory divergence rising
EU digital regulation (GDPR, AI Act, DMA) directly constrains Silicon Valley business models and market access
CPTPP digital trade rules affect tech IP and data flow across Pacific markets where Valley firms operate
